description: Afterwit: enqueue finished sessions for lesson distillation (SessionEnd) and surface recent lessons in new sessions (SessionStart). Both scripts are tiny, local-only, and fail silently rather than disturb a session.

hooks.command: if python3 -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/session_end.py"; elif python -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/session_end.py"; fi
if python3 -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/session_start.py"; elif python -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/session_start.py"; fi
